items.description: We recently published a list of Goldman Sachs Defense Stocks: Top 12 Stock Picks. In this article, we will take a look at where Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) stands against other top defense stock picks from the Goldman Sachs Portfolio. After a subdued start to the year, American defense stocks are beginning to see improved returns. […]
